objects.name: Analytic 1778
objects.description: Defender correlates an app preparing to phish (gaining overlay/notification/accessibility capability) with precise foreground targeting (reading activity in front via accessibility/focus) and then presenting a look-alike UI (overlay window or activity-on-top) immediately before local storage or small-burst egress of entered data. Chain: capability/permission → target app in foreground detected → overlay/activity-on-top or fake notification tap → local prompt input write → near-term network egress.

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:logcat
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: Grant/enablement of SYSTEM_ALERT_WINDOW, BIND_ACCESSIBILITY_SERVICE, POST_NOTIFICATIONS for <pkg>

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:logcat
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: TYPE_WINDOW_STATE_CHANGED / TYPE_VIEW_FOCUSED shows foreign target package in foreground

x_mitre_log_source_references.name: android:logcat
x_mitre_log_source_references.channel: startActivity on top of <target_pkg> (launchMode/singleTop), task switch immediately after focus

x_mitre_mutable_elements.description: Max time from overlay/activity to persist/exfil (e.g., 5–60s).
Require overlay evidence unless activity-on-top is observed (true/false).
List of high-value target packages (banking, identity) to raise severity.
Regex for local prompt data artifacts.
Known-good analytics/CDN/service domains to suppress FPs.
Work Profile/Kiosk mode/Accessibility allowlist to scope benign cases.
